column1: 東京をはじめ、大阪、名古屋などの都市でイベントが開催される。
column2: とうきょうをはじめ、おおさか、なごやなどのとしでいべんとがかいさいされる。
column3: Events will be held in cities starting with Tokyo, including Osaka, Nagoya, and more.
column4: をはじめ (starting with / as well as / including ~ and more)
column5: Noun + をはじめ(として) + [other examples/scope]
column6: introducing a representative example and implying others of the same category; 'starting with X, and others too'
column8: をはじめ = X is the prime example, plus others; だけでなく = not only X but also Y; など = and so on (adds examples); を含め = including
